title: Recall Config
description: Recall Config v1 contract for recall readiness and stop-sale linkage. Recall must use the traceability chain and must not build a separate chain.
$comment: Sources: PACK-01 recall/traceability and PACK-02 Recall Config requirement. TODO: recall severity taxonomy is not finalized in Phase 2 sources.

trace_chain_required.description: Recall readiness requires a complete trace chain.

sale_lock_required_on_recall.description: Whether sale lock/stop-sale is required when recall is active.

recovery_evidence_required.description: Whether recovery/disposition evidence is required before closing recall.
